cleavage agent: trypsin digestion of 50 µg of the sample
enrichment method: purified from the conditioned medium using two different columns: immobilized cobalt-affinity chromatography
fractionation method: purified by cobalt-affinity chromatography followed by size-exclusion chromatography (SEC)
instrument: analyzed using nanoelectrospray on an Orbitrap Q-Exactive plus
ionization type: analyzed using nanoelectrospray on an Orbitrap Q-Exactive plus
